introSection: Mine Train is a steel roller coaster located at Attractiepark Slagharen in Slagharen, Overijssel, Netherlands.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Mine Train is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater models. This is the largest model Vekoma offers.

fullText:
Mine Train is a steel roller coaster located at Attractiepark Slagharen in Slagharen, Overijssel, Netherlands.

Mine Train is one of Vekoma's 335m Roller Skater models. This is the largest model Vekoma offers.

Brown track and supports.
